name: Mint Chutney (Pudinaku Pacchadi)
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon peeled broken black gram dal (urad dal)
tamarind, the size of a small lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Squeeze tamarind into a little water.
2. Remove and clean mint leaves. Dry them thoroughly.
3. Fry red chillies, mustard seeds, and black gram until golden brown. Remove from heat and let cool for masala.
4. Fry mint leaves until they turn dark green. Allow to cool completely. Grind the spices with tamarind and salt. Add the cooled mint leaves and grind again.
